title: Taetoe Resources
description: A simple modpack that builds upon the Taetoe Minecraft server with some fun new vanilla additions!
body:
Taetoe Resources is a modpack intended to be used on the [Taetoe Minecraft Server](https://www.taetoe.vip/). As well as including a bunch of optimisation mods, it also includes many fun social mods, such as [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft), and [PatPat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/patpat).

Despite this being a modpack designed to enhance the game, the Taetoe server itself remains fully Vanilla. This modpack can be used on any Vanilla server, but the results may vary.
